Part.Source: Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPCONCILIACAOBANCARIA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &isValid = false &qtdItensConciliacao = 20 &ConciliarDataValor = true &ConciliarDataValor.Enabled = 0 &now = now() &ctabanCod.Clear() for &sdtContaItem in CarregaContaBancariaTipo(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, 0) if &sdtContaItem.CtaFunIsCx = Status_SimNao.Sim &ctabanCod.AddItem(&sdtContaItem.CtabanCod, &sdtContaItem.CtaBanCodNom) Endif endfor For &i = year(&now) - 7 to year(&now) step 1 &dataAno.AddItem(&i,str(&i)) Endfor &dataAno = year(&now) &dataMes = month(&now) do 'AtualizaDia' btnbtnNovosLancamentos.Visible = false /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid2Conciliados_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid2Conciliados.InternalName) &filtroMovCtaBanCod.Visible = False &filtrodataMes.Visible = False &filtrodataAno.Visible = False &filtrodataDia.Visible = False &filtroConMovCtaBanCod.Visible = False &filtroCondataMes.Visible = False &filtroCondataAno.Visible = False &filtroCondataDia.Visible = False &CtabanCodConciliacao.Visible = False &dataDiaConciliacao.Visible = False &dataMesConciliacao.Visible = False &dataAnoConciliacao.Visible = False Grid1.Rows = Page.Rows &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 &Grid1CurrentPage.Visible = False &Grid1PageCount = -1 Grid2Conciliados.Rows = Page.Rows &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage = 1 &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage.Visible = False &Grid2ConciliadosPageCount = -1 SdtConciliacao__LanBanCreDeb.Visible = False GridMovimentosDaConciliacao.Rows = 1000 &ActionGroup1Data = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Reiniciar conciliação' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'UserReiniciar' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Apagar Conciliação' &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'UserApagarConciliacao' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid1.Rows Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid2Conciliados.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh &Grid1PageCount = Grid1.PageCount &Grid1CurrentPage = Grid1.currentPage &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage = Grid2Conciliados.CurrentPage &Grid2ConciliadosPageCount = Grid2Conciliados.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&Grid1PageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&Grid2ConciliadosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. LanBanStatus.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' LanBanVlr.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserDelete = !'' If (MovSts.IsEmpty() or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado) &UserDelete.Link = WPMovimentoDelete.Link(EmpCod, MovCod, MovCtaBanCod) &UserDelete.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserDelete.Link = "" &UserDelete.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &UserUpdate = !'' If (MovTip <> TipoMOvimento.Adiantamento) &UserUpdate.Link = WPMovimento.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, MovCod, 0) &UserUpdate.Class = !'Attribute' Else &UserUpdate.Link = "" &UserUpdate.Class = !'Invisible' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid2Conciliados.Load &gridConciliadoEmpCod = EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserAction1 = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' Do Case Case LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado LanBanStatus.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Ignorar LanBanStatus.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.JaConciliado LanBanStatus.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Pendente LanBanStatus.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Otherwise LanBanStatus.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case LanBanCreDeb.ToString().Trim() = !"C" LanBanVlr.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case LanBanCreDeb.ToString().Trim() = !"D" LanBanVlr.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise LanBanVlr.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event fsgConciliacao.Load GridMovimentosDaConciliacao.Rows = 1000 if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb = 'C' //CREDITO SdtConciliacao__LanBanVlr.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,255) Else //DEBITO SdtConciliacao__LanBanVlr.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif // &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado TabelaConciliacaoooo.Visible = false else TabelaConciliacaoooo.Visible = true if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.Count = 0 &ctabanCodDestino.Enabled = true if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb = 'C' tbDebito.Visible = false tbCredito.Visible = true &PlanCodCre.Enabled = true Else tbDebito.Visible = true tbCredito.Visible = false &PlanCodDeb.Enabled = true Endif for &ExcetoSdtContaBancariaItem in &ExcetoSdtContaBancaria &ctabanCodDestino.AddItem(&ExcetoSdtContaBancariaItem.CtabanCod, &ExcetoSdtContaBancariaItem.CtaBanCodNom) endfor if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb = 'C' &CtabanCodDestino.Caption = 'Conta bancária origem' else &CtabanCodDestino.Caption = 'Conta bancária destino' endif TabelaMovimentacoes.Visible = false TabelaMovimentacoesValores.Visible = false TabelaConciliacaoo.Visible = true else TabelaMovimentacoes.Visible = true TabelaMovimentacoesValores.Visible = true TabelaConciliacaoo.Visible = false endif endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridMovimentosDaConciliacao.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &btnDesvincular = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ GridMovimentosDaConciliacao.Rows = 1000 if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.Count > 0 &SdtConciliacaoItem = &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem &lancamentoSistema = 0 for &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem in &SdtConciliacaoItem.Movimento &gridCodigo = str(&SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovCod) + '/' + str(&SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovItmCod) &gridMovDtaPgt = &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovDtaCon &gridMovItmCpl = &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovItmlCpl &gridMovItmVlr = &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovVlr &gridPlanCodNom = &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.PlanCodNom if &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovCreDeb = &SdtConciliacaoItem.LanBanCreDeb &lancamentoSistema += &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovVlr Else &lancamentoSistema -= &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovVlr Endif if &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovCreDeb = 'C' &gridMovItmVlr.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,255) Else &gridMovItmVlr.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif load endfor &LanBanDesc = &SdtConciliacaoItem.LanBanDesc GridMovimentosDaConciliacao.Rows = &SdtConciliacaoItem.Movimento.Count &lancamentoBanco = &SdtConciliacaoItem.LanBanVlr if &lancamentoBanco > 0 &lancamentoDiferenca = &lancamentoBanco - &lancamentoSistema else &lancamentoDiferenca = (&lancamentoBanco * -1 ) - &lancamentoSistema endif if &lancamentoDiferenca = 0 &lancamentoDiferenca.Class = 'ReadonlyDashboardInfo' else &lancamentoDiferenca.Class = 'ReadonlyDashboardDanger' endif endif EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &Grid1CurrentPage -= 1 Grid1.PreviousPage() Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &Grid1CurrentPage += 1 Grid1.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage) &Grid1CurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid1.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1.Rows = Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 Grid1.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage -= 1 Grid2Conciliados.PreviousPage() Case Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage += 1 Grid2Conciliados.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid2Conciliados.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid2Conciliados.Rows = Grid2ConciliadosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &Grid2ConciliadosCurrentPage = 1 Grid2Conciliados.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserFiltrarLancamentos' For Each ORder EmpCod, CtabanCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtabanCod = &CtabanCod if not CtaBanNomExib.IsEmpty() and not CtaBanNomExib.IsNull() txtLabel.Caption = CtaBanNomExib Else txtLabel.Caption = CtaBanCodNom Endif &filtroMovCtaBanCod = CtabanCod &filtrodataMes = &dataMes &filtrodataAno = &dataAno &filtrodataDia = &dataDia Grid1.Refresh() Exit EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserFiltrarConciliados' For Each ORder EmpCod, CtabanCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtabanCod = &CtabanCod if not CtaBanNomExib.IsEmpty() and not CtaBanNomExib.IsNull() txtLabelContaConciliada.Caption = CtaBanNomExib Else txtLabelContaConciliada.Caption = CtaBanCodNom Endif &filtroConMovCtaBanCod = CtabanCod &filtroCondataMes = &dataMes &filtroCondataAno = &dataAno &filtroCondataDia = &dataDia grid2Conciliados.Refresh() Exit EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnConfirmarSelecionados' do 'ValidarSelecionados' do 'Mensagem' if &isValid ControleWPConciliacao('CONSEL', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) do 'Mensagem' If &msgType = DVMessageType.success &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado EndIf endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnNovosLancamentos' &WebSession.Set('SdtConciliacao',&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ btnNovosLancamentos_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event btnNovosLancamentos_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcSelecionaMovimentoItemConciliacao.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event btnNovosLancamentos_Modal.Close do 'PesquisarLancamentos' if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ endif EndEvent Event 'DobtnCancelarSelecionados' &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.Clear() &totalDiferenca = 0 &totalSistema = 0 &WebSession.Remove('SdtConciliacao') TabelaConciliacaoo.Visible = true TabelaMovimentacoes.Visible = false /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnConciliarTransferencia' //transferencia do 'ValidarTransferencia' if &isValid if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb = 'C' Transferencia.Call(&EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&CtabanCodDestino,&CtabanCodConciliacao,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDesc + ', [SISTEMA] Conciliação bancária',&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanVlr,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanData,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDoc,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDesc,'C',&Error) else Transferencia.Call(&EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&CtabanCodConciliacao,&CtabanCodDestino,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDesc + ', [SISTEMA] Conciliação bancária',&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanVlr,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanData,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDoc,&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanDesc,'D',&Error) endif If &Error = 1 Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Oops!', 'Algum erro interno ocorreu durante a transferência', DVMessageType.error, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) Else ControleWPConciliacao('JACON', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Feito!', 'Conciliado a transferência entre contas', DVMessageType.success, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado endif endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnPesquisar' &WebSession.Set('SdtConciliacao',&SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ btnPesquisar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event btnPesquisar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcSelecionaMovimentoItemConciliacao.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event btnPesquisar_Modal.Close do 'PesquisarLancamentos' if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ endif EndEvent Event 'DobtnConciliarLancamento' &CreDeb = &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanCreDeb // lançamento do 'ValidarLancamento' if &isValid ControleWPConciliacao('NEWLAN', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) do 'Mensagem' if &msgType = DVMessageType.success &AuxPlanCod = 0 &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado endif endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBtnIgnorar' &SdtConciliacaoItem = &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem ControleWPConciliacao('IGNO', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacaoItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) do 'Mensagem' if &msgType = DVMessageType.success &AuxPlanCod = 0 &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBtnJaConciliado' ControleWPConciliacao('JACON', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) do 'Mensagem' if &msgType = DVMessageType.success &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.Conciliado endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnAtualizar' &CtabanCodConciliacao = &CtaBanCod &dataAnoConciliacao = &dataAno &dataMesConciliacao = &dataMes &dataDiaConciliacao = &dataDia do 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoConciliacaoAutomatica' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnConciliacaoAutomatica.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnConciliacaoAutomatica.Close if DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnConciliacaoAutomatica.Result = !'Yes' ControleWPConciliacao('AUTO', &Context, &CtabanCodConciliacao, &AuxPlanCod, &SdtConciliacaoItem, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) do 'Mensagem' endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnConciliacaoAutomatica.Result = !'Yes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraSdo' WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTranferencia' MonitoraTransferencias.PopUp() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoHomologados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Homologados_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Homologados_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcBancosHomologadosConciliacao.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Homologados_Modal.Close if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ endif EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup1.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'UserReiniciar' Do 'Do UserReiniciar' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'UserApagarConciliacao' Do 'Do UserApagarConciliacao' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserReiniciar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcReiniciarConciliacao.Create(&CtaBanCod, &DataAno, &DataMes, &DataDia) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserReiniciar_Modal.Close &CtabanCodConciliacao = &CtaBanCod &dataAnoConciliacao = &dataAno &dataMesConciliacao = &dataMes &dataDiaConciliacao = &dataDia do 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserApagarConciliacao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcApagarConciliacoes.Create(&CtaBanCod, &DataAno, &DataMes, &DataDia) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event UserApagarConciliacao_Modal.Close &CtabanCodConciliacao = &CtaBanCod &dataAnoConciliacao = &dataAno &dataMesConciliacao = &dataMes &dataDiaConciliacao = &dataDia do 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?c201a32d-1ae7-46b0-9610-970b25b24945' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid2Conciliados_DWC.Object = wcDetailConciliacao.Create(EmpCod, CtabanCod, LanBanDoc) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do UserReiniciar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserReiniciar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserApagarConciliacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UserApagarConciliacao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &btnDesvincular.Click for &SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem in &sdtconciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento if &gridCodigo = str(&SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovCod) + '/' + str(&SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem.MovItmCod) &sdtconciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.Remove(&sdtconciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.IndexOf(&SdtConciliacaoItemMovimentoItem)) endif endfor EndEvent Event &dataMes.ControlValueChanged do 'AtualizaDia' EndEvent Event FileUpload1.UploadFailed &FileUploadDataColl.Clear() FileUpload1.Clear() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Confira se o arquivo importado é de fato o extrato do banco', DVMessageType.information, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Extensão suportada: .OFX', DVMessageType.information, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Oops!', 'Ocorreu algum problema ao fazer o upload do arquivo', DVMessageType.error, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) EndEvent Event FileUpload1.UploadComplete For &FileUploadData in &FileUploadDataColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() if upper(&FileUploadData.Extension) = 'OFX' &File.Source = &FileUploadData.File &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close() If &selectedURL <> '' ImportaLancamentoOFX.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &selectedURL, &sdtMensagens) do 'Mensagem' &CtabanCodConciliacao = &CtaBanCod &dataAnoConciliacao = &dataAno &dataMesConciliacao = &dataMes &dataDiaConciliacao = &dataDia do 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' Else msg('Arquivo Inválido!') EndIf else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Confira se o arquivo importado é de fato o extrato do banco', DVMessageType.information, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Extensão inválida!', 'Selecione um arquivo com a extensão .OFX', DVMessageType.error, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) endif EndIf EndFor &FileUploadDataColl.Clear() FileUpload1.Clear() EndEvent Event &localizar.ControlValueChanged &CtabanCodConciliacao = &CtaBanCod &dataAnoConciliacao = &dataAno &dataMesConciliacao = &dataMes &dataDiaConciliacao = &dataDia do 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' EndEvent Event &UserAction1.Click &sdtLancamentoItemCancela = new() &sdtLancamentoItemCancela.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtLancamentoItemCancela.LanBanCod = LanBanCod &sdtLancamentoItemCancela.LanBanDoc = LanBanDoc do case case LanBanStatus = statusConciliacao.Conciliado ControleWPConciliacao('DESCON', &Context, CtabanCod, &AuxPlanCod, &sdtLancamentoItemCancela, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) case LanBanStatus = statusConciliacao.Ignorar or LanBanStatus = statusConciliacao.JaConciliado or LanBanStatus.IsEmpty() ControleWPConciliacao('ATUAPEN', &Context, CtabanCod, &AuxPlanCod, &sdtLancamentoItemCancela, &SdtConciliacao, &sdtMensagens, &msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType) endcase do 'Mensagem' If &msgType = DVMessageType.success do 'CarregaMovimentacoes' endif grid2Conciliados.Refresh() EndEvent Sub 'PesquisarLancamentos' if not &WebSession.Get('SdtConciliacao').IsEmpty() &SdtConciliacaoItemAux.FromJson(&WebSession.Get('SdtConciliacao')) &WebSession.Remove('SdtConciliacao') for &SdtConciliacaoItem in &SdtConciliacao if &SdtConciliacaoitem.LanBanDoc = &SdtConciliacaoItemAux.LanBanDoc &SdtConciliacaoItem.movimento.clear() &SdtConciliacaoItem.movimento.FromJson(&SdtConciliacaoItemAux.Movimento.ToJson()) &LanBanDesc = &SdtConciliacaoItem.LanBanDesc exit endif endfor endif EndSub Sub 'AtualizaDia' &dataAux = YMDtoD(&dataAno, &dataMes, 1) &data = EoM(&dataAux) &dataDia.clear() &dataDia.AddItem(0,'MÊS INTEIRO') For &i = 1 to &data.Day() &dataDia.AddItem(&i,str(&i)) Endfor EndSub Sub 'CarregaMovimentacoes' &sdtLancamentos = CarregaLancamentos(&Context.EmpCod, &CtabanCod, &dataDia, &dataMes, &dataAno,&qtdItensMovimentacao) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Atualizado', '', DVMessageType.success, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) EndSub Sub 'ValidarLancamento' &isValid = false &AuxPlanCod = 0 Do CAse Case &CreDeb = 'D' RetornaCodigoPlanoContas.Call(&EmpCod, &PlanCodDeb, &AuxPlanCod) CAse &CreDeb = 'C' RetornaCodigoPlanoContas.Call(&EmpCod, &PlanCodCre, &AuxPlanCod) EndCAse if &AuxPlanCod.IsEmpty() or &CreDeb.IsEmpty() &isValid = false Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Campo inválido', 'Plano de contas não existe', DVMessageType.error, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) else &isValid = true endif EndSub Sub 'ValidarTransferencia' &isValid = false PrcValidaCaixaAberto.Call(&EmpCod, &CtabanCod, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanData, &IsCaixaFechado, &MensagemConferencia) PrcValidaCaixaAberto.Call(&EmpCod, &CtabanCodDestino, &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanData, &IsCaixaFechadoEmissao, &MensagemEmissao) Do Case Case &IsCaixaFechado = true msg('a: ' + &MensagemConferencia) Case &IsCaixaFechadoEmissao = true msg('b: ' + &MensagemEmissao) Otherwise if &CtabanCodDestino.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Oops!', 'Selecione uma conta bancária de transferência para realizar a conciliação', DVMessageType.error, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) &CtabanCodDestino.SetFocus() else If &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanVlr > 0 // Valor a Transferir If &CtabanCodDestino > 0 // Conta Bancaria de Destino If not &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.LanBanData.IsEmpty() &isValid = true Else msg('ATENÇÃO! A data de transferência não pode Ser vazia!') EndIf Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Conta de destino inválida, selecione uma conta de destino!') EndIf Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Valor a transferir tem que ser maior que zero! verifique.') EndIf endif endcase EndSub Sub 'Mensagem' if not &msgMensagem.IsEmpty() or not &msgTitulo.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg(&msgTitulo, &msgMensagem, &msgType, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) endif for &sdtMensagem in &sdtMensagens Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg(&sdtMensagem.msgTitulo, &sdtMensagem.msgMensagem, &sdtMensagem.msgType, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) endfor &sdtMensagens.Clear() &msgMensagem.SetEmpty() &msgTitulo.SetEmpty() EndSub Sub 'ValidarSelecionados' &isValid = false if &SdtConciliacao.CurrentItem.Movimento.Count > 0 &isValid = true &msgTitulo = '' &msgMensagem = '' &msgType = DVMessageType.noSpecify else &msgTitulo = 'Oops!' &msgMensagem = 'Não há movimentos para que seja conciliado.' &msgType = DVMessageType.error endif EndSub Sub 'CarregaConciliacoesPendentes' &Pesquisar.SetEmpty() if not &localizar.IsEmpty() if &localizar.Substring(1,1) <> '%' &Pesquisar = '%'+&localizar Endif &Pesquisar = &Pesquisar.Replace(' ', '%') Endif &SdtConciliacao = prcCarregaLancamentosParaConciliacao.Udp(&EmpCod,&CtabanCodConciliacao,&dataDiaConciliacao,&dataMesConciliacao,&dataAnoConciliacao, &qtdItensConciliacao, &Pesquisar, &ConciliarDataValor, &ConciliarAproximada, &Moeda) &ExcetoSdtContaBancaria = CarregaContaBancariaExceto(&EmpCod, &CtabanCodConciliacao) &count = &SdtConciliacao.Count if &count = 0 Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Que ótimo!', 'Não há conciliações pendentes', DVMessageType.success, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('Conciliações pendentes', str(&SdtConciliacao.Count) + ' conciliações pendentes neste mês', DVMessageType.information, '', DVMessageBoolean.True)) endif EndSub

Part.InnerHtml: No load, ao ocultar uma tabela, obrigatoriamente deve estar explícito uma condição else que faça ela ficar visível
